_note: This file is a design-time snapshot and may be out of date. For current step state, run: iw item-status <ID> --json. The DB is the authoritative source of truth (CR-00023).
title: Copy paste prompt button silently fails over plain HTTP from a non-localhost hostname

steps.description: Add dashboard/static/clipboard.js (window.iwClipboard.copy(text, button?)) with secure-context branch + textarea+execCommand fallback + 'Copied' / 'Copy failed' UI feedback. Load it from base.html. Replace ALL 7 inline navigator.clipboard.writeText callsites (item_execution_report.html, oss_cli_block.html, oss_install_modal.html, pages/project/oss.html, chat/actions.js, chat/render.js x2) to use the helper. Add a 'Clipboard buttons' note to dashboard/CLAUDE.md.

Review S01: helper correctness on both branches; every callsite migrated (grep for navigator.clipboard.writeText must show only inside clipboard.js); UI feedback works for success and failure; no leaked DOM nodes (textarea cleanup); no behaviour regression for the secure-context happy path; the OSS page's local copyToClipboard is removed (not duplicated).

Add tests/dashboard/test_i00070_clipboard_fallback.py (server-side fragment assertions: rendered HTML must NOT contain navigator.clipboard.writeText, must contain iwClipboard.copy or data-iw-copy wiring, must still embed the prompt text). Add tests/dashboard/browser/test_i00070_clipboard_fallback.py (Playwright: open the dashboard via localhost, monkey-patch window.isSecureContext = false and delete navigator.clipboard, click the Copy paste prompt button, assert button label changes to 'Copied' AND no TypeError appears in console). Both tests must use semantic-correctness assertions, not shape-only checks.
Review S03: tests are falsifiable on main (would fail on the buggy template); semantic-correctness assertions only; no flaky timing in the Playwright test; fixtures clean up.

Global review across S01 + S03: helper + every migrated callsite + tests integrate end-to-end; the regression test exercises the broken path; no other clipboard users regressed; full unit + integration suite passes.
QV: Browser verification — confirm Copy paste prompt button works on a non-secure-context simulation in the isolated worktree stack
Self-assessment of the just-completed item via the iw-item-analyze skill
